cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Bob ends up after all those swaps. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts in a specific position. Original positions: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me track each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So after this, Dave is right midfielder and Bob becomes cheerleader? Wait, no. Wait, original positions: Bob is right midfielder, Dave is cheerleader. So swapping them would make Bob the cheerleader and Dave the right midfielder. Let me note that. After first swap (Dave and Bob): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was right midfielder, Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave is goalkeeper and Eve is right midfielder. After second swap (Dave and Eve): - Alice: right winger - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: right midfielder Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice is right winger, Bob
